markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the AccuWeather source linked above, not any other weather service.

NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.

AccuWeather readings may be posted several minutes prior to the labeled hour. For example, a 12:00 PM reading may appear as early as 11:51 AM. The value is still considered the official reading for the labeled hour.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary AccuWeather readings.
